Package com.koralix.commons.value

Interface Value.Listener<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the value type
Enclosing interface:
Value<T>
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface Value.Listener<T>
A listener for value changes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onValueChanged(Value<T> value, T oldValue, T newValue)
    Called when the value changes.

  • Method Details

    • onValueChanged

      void onValueChanged(Value<T> value, T oldValue, T newValue)
      Called when the value changes.
      Parameters:
      value - the value
      oldValue - the old value
      newValue - the new value
